title: X-Treme Barista
description: Baristas compete head-to-head to see who can make the superior cup of coffee. Who will get French pressed?
quote: I ain’t come to here to make friends, I came here to make blends, dawg!
altHero: Yuji, a barista wearing big wraparound sunglasses, holds up a coffee cup with a froth swan
alt1: a hand holds a coffee cup under a milk frother
alt2: Yuji presents his swan coffee to a judge
alt3: Kid Crunchy Z pours a green energy drink into the espresso thing
alt4: Yuji being apprehended by the cops
